raw_title: Shape, Symmetries, and Structure: The Changing Role of Mathematics in Machine Learning Research
raw_content: What is the Role of Mathematics in Modern Machine Learning?The past decade has witnessed a shift in how progress is made in machine learning. Research involving carefully designed and mathematically principled architectures result in only marginal improvements while compute-intensive and engineering-first efforts that scale to ever larger training sets
generated_title: 数学在机器学习研究中的角色转变：从理论架构到工程Scaling
generated_summary: 过去十年机器学习进展方式发生转变，数学原则架构仅带来边际改进，计算密集型工程Scaling方法成为主导。
